# PHIL.101 ? Data-Driven Decision Making

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** decision_making
**Subcategory:** data_driven_decision_making
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Base decisions on evidence and metrics rather than intuition alone

## Application
Collect relevant data, analyze objectively, test assumptions, measure outcomes, iterate based on results

philosophy, decision-making, data-driven-decision-making
